allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''package.json''\)\); print\(''Angular:'', d[''dependencies''].get\(''@angular/core'',''''\)\); print\(''Build cmd:'', d[''scripts''].get\(''build'',''''\)\)")
Bash(sed -i 's/¹/1/g; s/²/2/g; s/³/3/g; s/⁴/4/g; s/⁵/5/g; s/⁶/6/g' "$f")

hooks.command: grep -qiE '(thêm|add |feature|tính năng|implement|tạo |viết|new )' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"TDD REMINDER: Write unit test FIRST before implementing. Process: Red (test fail) -> Green (pass) -> Refactor. Backend: dotnet test. Frontend: ng test. Run tests after every change."}}' || true

grep -qE 'git (commit|push)' && echo '{"systemMessage": "Nhớ cập nhật docs nếu có thay đổi architecture/entity/API/feature/convention:\ndocs/architecture.md | docs/business-domain.md | docs/features.md | docs/project-context.md | CHANGELOG.md"}' || true
